content:
Just now

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

Cover artwork created using ChatGPTAt first, writing SQL queries feels quite simple and easy to do. A few SELECT statements, some WHERE conditions, and everything works perfectly. But as queries become larger and more complex, readability starts to disappear, making the queries difficult to understand and harder to manage.
As developers struggled with increasingly complex SQL queries, confusion slowly started taking over the database world. Nested conditions, multiple filters, and difficult logic made queries harder to understand and manage. Just when things started becoming messy, our first hero arrived — Subquery. Compact, quick, and powerful , Subquery stepped in to solve problems from inside another query while keeping things short and efficient.
